reason: Verify audio mixing remains opt-in and compatible with edit-plan/export contracts.
Verify durable artifact/state behavior and exporter fallback semantics.
Verify typed contracts, idempotency, and explicit UTF-8 file handling.
Verify missing audio assets fail closed without crashing the pipeline.
Verify skip/fallback logs are concise and no sensitive paths beyond local configured paths are over-logged.
Verify config-to-planner-to-exporter data flow is covered by tests.
